title: Vandiyur Mariamman Temple
tagline: Vandiyur Mariamman Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vandiyur Mariamman Temple is a Hindu Temple in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Vandiyur Mariamman Temple is a Hindu Temple in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Mariamman. It is located on the banks of the Vaigai River, about 3 km (1.9 mi) from the Meenakshi Amman Temple. There is a temple tank located near to the temple, and is used during temple festivities.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Melamadai
topPlaces.description: Melamadai is 30th ward of Madurai corporation in Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. In 2012 Melamadai included in Madurai Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Anuppanadi
topPlaces.description: Anuppanadi is a neighbourhood in Madurai district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India, located with the geographical coordinates of 9°54′17.3″N 78°08′24.4″E (i.e., 9.904800°N, 78.140100°E) and at an altitude of about 152 m above the mean sea level. Madurai, Vandiyur, Anna Nagar, K. K. Nagar, East Gate, South Gate, Goripalayam, Sellur, Simmakkal, Yanaikkal and Nelpettai are some of the important neighbourhoods of Anuppanadi.

topPlaces.name: Vandiyur
topPlaces.description: Vandiyur is a census town in Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Milan'em Mall
topPlaces.description: Milan'em Mall is a shopping mall in K.K. Nagar, Madurai, India. It was opened on 28 September 2009 and is the first shopping mall in Madurai.

topPlaces.name: Gandhi Memorial Museum, Madurai
topPlaces.description: Gandhi Memorial Museum, established in 1959, is a memorial museum for Mahatma Gandhi located in the city of Madurai in Tamil Nadu, India. Known as Gandhi Museum, it is now one of the five Gandhi Sanghralayas (Gandhi Museums) in the country.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Cathedral, Madurai
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Cathedral Shrine or Church of Our Lady of Dolours is a Roman Catholic church situated in Madurai, Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Archdiocese of Madurai
topPlaces.description: The Metropolitan Archdiocese of Madurai (Latin: Madhuraien(sis)) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical jurisdiction or archdiocese of the Catholic Church. Its episcopal see is located in the city of Madurai, India.

topPlaces.name: Alwarpuram
topPlaces.description: Alwarpuram which is pronounced as 'Aallhwaarpuram' is a neighbourhood in Madurai of Tamil Nadu state in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vandiyur Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vandiyur Mariamman Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vandiyur Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vandiyur Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vandiyur Mariamman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vandiyur Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vandiyur Mariamman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vandiyur Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Melamadai, Anuppanadi, Vandiyur, Milan'em Mall, Gandhi Memorial Museum, Madurai.
